Opcode.name: PCM_OP_SUBSCRIPTION_SET_DISCOUNTINFO
Opcode.Doc:
PCM_OP_SUBSCRIPTION_SET_DISCOUNTINFO input and output flist specifications. This opcode is called to modify or set a discount's purchase, cycle, or usage date information. If the PCM_OPFLG_CALC_ONLY flag is set, this opcode returns the entire event flist for the events created as a result of the modification. If not, it returns the event POIDs of all event objects created as a result of the modification.
When automatic rerating is enabled, this opcode triggers automatic rerating of backdated discount status changes when certain conditions are met.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: Account object action was applied to.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_SERVICE_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Service object action was applied to.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_SESSION_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Session object - session in which event took place - null means none.

String.name: PIN_FLD_DESCR
String.Doc: Event description - free text for application to describe event.

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_START_T
Timestamp.Doc: Start time - Timestamp of when event started (Portal Time).

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_END_T
Timestamp.Doc: End time - Timestamp of when event ended (Portal Time). This field is used to determine which billing cycle the event is part of.

Array.name: PIN_FLD_DISCOUNTS
Array.Doc: Discounts array. Only one element can appear in this array. Element-id is not relevant. It uniquely identifies the account discount by its offering_obj .

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_OFFERING_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Uniquely identifies a discount in an account.

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_PURCHASE_START_T
Timestamp.Doc: Purchase start time - Timestamp that discount activates (Portal Time).

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_PURCHASE_END_T
Timestamp.Doc: Purchase end time - Timestamp that discount expires (Portal Time), 0 means that discount does not expire.

Int.name: PIN_FLD_PURCHASE_END_UNIT
Int.Doc: Relative Unit for Purchase Can be Seconds=1,Minutes=2,Hours=3,Days=4, Months=5, Cycles=8 and Event cycles=9. For First Usage unit should be passed as -1. For unit=0, the purchase end_t would be checked. If unit is 0 and purchase end_t is 0 then End Never. If unit is 0 and purchase end_t is greater than 0 then purchase end date is an Absolute date. Based on this the purchase end details would be calculated.

Int.name: PIN_FLD_PURCHASE_END_OFFSET
Int.Doc: Relative offset for Purchase startT to be used in conjunction with unit to calculate Purchase endT on First Usage.

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_CYCLE_START_T
Timestamp.Doc: Cycle fee start time - timestamp that cycle fees begin for this discount (Portal Time), 0 means immediately. This field should not be changed for an existing discount.

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_CYCLE_END_T
Timestamp.Doc: Cycle fee end time - Timestamp that cycle fees are no longer applied for this discount (Portal Time), 0 means always applied.

Int.name: PIN_FLD_CYCLE_END_UNIT
Int.Doc: Relative Unit for Cycle Can be Seconds=1, Minutes=2, Hours=3, Days=4, Months=5, Cycles=8 and Event cycles=9. For First Usage unit should be passed as -1. For unit=0, the cycle end_t would be checked. If unit is 0 and cycle end_t is 0 then End Never. If unit is 0 and cycle end_t is greater than 0 then cycle end date is an Absolute date. Based on this the cycle end details would be calculated.

Int.name: PIN_FLD_CYCLE_END_OFFSET
Int.Doc: Relative offset for Cycle to be used in conjunction with unit to calculate Cycle end_t.

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_USAGE_START_T
Timestamp.Doc: Usage fee start time - timestamp that usage fees begin for this discount (Portal Time) (0 means immediately)

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_USAGE_END_T
Timestamp.Doc: Usage fee end time - timestapm that usage fees are no longer applied for this discount (Portal Time) (0 means always applied).

Int.name: PIN_FLD_USAGE_END_UNIT
Int.Doc: Relative Unit for Usage Can be Seconds=1, Minutes=2, Hours=3, Days=4, Months=5, Cycles=8 and Event cycles=9. For First Usage unit should be passed as -1. For unit=0, the usage end_t would be checked. If unit is 0 and usage end_t is 0 then End Never. If unit is 0 and usage end_t is greater than 0 then usage end date is an Absolute date. Based on this the usage end details would be calculated.

Int.name: PIN_FLD_USAGE_END_OFFSET
Int.Doc: Relative offset for Usage to be used in conjunction with unit to calculate Usage end_t on First Usage.

String.name: PIN_FLD_DESCR
String.Doc: Description on a per discount basis for CSR to add comments

Array.name: PIN_FLD_OVERRIDE_DISCOUNTS
Array.Doc: Pricing override discount or the discount whose pricing should be overridden.

Int.name: PIN_FLD_FLAGS
Int.Doc: This flags tells whether to create, read, update or delete the /offering_override_values. If the flag passed is 1(PIN_CREATE_DATE_RANGE), it will add new DATE_RANGE in the specified usage map and if that usage map doesn't exist, it will create new usage map. If no object is linked to purchased discount, it will create a new object for overrides. If the flag passed is 2(PIN_UPDATE_TAGS), it will update or add the tag in the matching date ranges. If the flag passed is 3(PIN_DELETE_OFFER), it will delete the offering override object linked to purchased discount. If the flag passed is 4(PIN_DELETE_DATE_RANGE), it will delete the matching date ranges. If the flag passed is 5(PIN_DELETE_TAGS), it will delete the listed tags in input for that date range.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EVENT_TYPE
String.Doc: Type of event that this entry specifies rating for. Unique within usage map.

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_END_T
Timestamp.Doc: End time. Note that the last DATE_RANGES can have END_T as NULL i.e. the specified DATE_RANGES will be valid for entire discount cycle.

String.name: PIN_FLD_NAME
String.Doc: Name of the scaled or fixed tag.

Decimal.name: PIN_FLD_AMOUNT
Decimal.Doc: Override amount in Decimal data type

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.

Array.name: PIN_FLD_RESULTS
Array.Doc: Array of results information. Since only one event object is created by this call, only one element will be returned. The element-id is not significant. Fields of event object.Additional event object fields are added to the return flist here. If the PCM_OPFLG_READ_RESULT flag is set for the operation, all the fields in the event object are returned on the output flist, not just the POID. If the PCM_OPFLG_CALC_ONLY flag is set, no fields in the database are changed and the event object is not actually created, but the fields that would have been used to create the event object are returned to the caller on the output flist.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.
